mapper.insert: insert into emps(username, password, name, role,status , entry_date, create_id, create_time, update_id, update_time) values (#{username},#{password}, #{name}, #{role}, #{status}, #{entryDate} ,#{createId}, #{createTime}, #{updateId}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select:
select id, username, name, role, status, entry_date from emps
name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
status = #{status}
order by create_time desc
